scripts.db:check: node -e "const { Client } = require('pg'); const conn = process.env.DATABASE_URL || process.env.POSTGRES_URL || process.env.POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL || process.env.DATABASE_URL_UNPOOLED; if (!conn) { console.error('Missing database connection string.'); process.exit(1); } const client = new Client({ connectionString: conn, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }); client.connect().then(() => { console.log('Connected to the database successfully.'); return client.end(); }).catch((err) => { console.error(err.message); process.exit(1); });"
